items.summary:
Andrew Nesbitt discovered that opam did not properly validate file
destination paths in package install files. An attacker could use this
issue to bypass sandbox protections and write files to arbitrary locations,
possibly leading to arbitrary code execution.

items.title: USN-8253-1: Postfix vulnerability
items.summary:
Kamil Frankowicz discovered that Postfix incorrectly handled certain
enhanced status codes. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to
cause Postfix to crash, resulting in a denial of service.
